features.name: Rage
features.description: Bonus action to enter rage. While raging: advantage on STR checks/saves, +2 melee damage with STR weapons, resistance to bludgeoning/piercing/slashing. Lasts 1 minute. Uses per long rest increase with level (2 at L1, 3 at L3, 4 at L6, 5 at L12, 6 at L17, unlimited at L20).

features.name: Unarmored Defense
features.description: While not wearing armor, your AC = 10 + DEX modifier + CON modifier. You can still use a shield.

features.name: Reckless Attack
features.description: Attack with advantage on all STR-based melee attacks this turn, but attack rolls against you have advantage until your next turn.

features.name: Danger Sense
features.description: Advantage on DEX saving throws against visible effects (traps, spells) while not blind, deafened, or incapacitated.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two by 1 each (max 20).

features.name: Extra Attack
features.description: You can attack twice instead of once when you take the Attack action.

features.name: Fast Movement
features.description: Your speed increases by 10 feet while you aren't wearing heavy armor.

features.name: Feral Instinct
features.description: Advantage on Initiative rolls. If surprised at combat start, act normally on your first turn if you enter rage before doing anything else.

features.name: Brutal Critical
features.description: Roll one additional weapon damage die on a critical hit with a melee attack. (Two dice at L13, three dice at L17.)

features.name: Mindless Rage
features.description: You can't be charmed or frightened while raging. If you are when you rage, that effect is suspended for the rage's duration.

features.name: Relentless Rage
features.description: If reduced to 0 HP while raging and not killed outright, make DC 10 CON save to drop to 1 HP instead. DC increases by 5 each time used; resets on long rest.

features.name: Persistent Rage
features.description: Your rage ends early only if you fall unconscious or choose to end it.

features.name: Indomitable Might
features.description: If your STR check total is lower than your STR score, use your STR score instead.

features.name: Primal Champion
features.description: STR and CON each increase by 4, and their maximums increase to 24.

features.name: Spellcasting
features.description: Know 2 cantrips and 4 spells from the Bard list. Spellcasting ability: Charisma.

features.name: Bardic Inspiration
features.description: Bonus action: grant one creature within 60 ft a Bardic Inspiration die (d6, scaling with level). They can add it to one ability check, attack, or save within 10 min. Uses = CHA modifier (min 1) per long rest.

features.name: Jack of All Trades
features.description: Add half your proficiency bonus (rounded down) to any ability check you aren't proficient in.

features.name: Song of Rest
features.description: During a short rest, allies who can hear your performance regain extra HP when spending Hit Dice (d6, scaling with level).

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two by 1 each.

features.name: Bardic Inspiration (d8)
features.description: Your Bardic Inspiration die becomes a d8.

features.name: Font of Inspiration
features.description: You regain Bardic Inspiration uses on a short or long rest.

features.name: Countercharm
features.description: As an action, begin a performance. Allies within 30 ft who can hear you have advantage on saves vs. being frightened or charmed, until end of your next turn.

features.name: Magical Secrets
features.description: Choose 2 spells from any class spell list. They count as bard spells for you and are always prepared.

features.name: Superior Inspiration
features.description: If you have no Bardic Inspiration dice when rolling Initiative, you regain 1 use.

features.name: Spellcasting
features.description: Prepare cleric spells equal to WIS modifier + your level. Spellcasting ability: Wisdom.

features.name: Channel Divinity (1/rest)
features.description: Invoke divine energy for Turn Undead or your domain's special effect. Recover on a short or long rest.

features.name: Turn Undead
features.description: As an action, present holy symbol. Each undead within 30 ft makes a WIS save or is turned for 1 minute.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two by 1 each.

features.name: Destroy Undead (CR 1/2)
features.description: Undead with CR ≤ 1/2 that fail Turn Undead are destroyed instantly.

features.name: Channel Divinity (2/rest)
features.description: You can use Channel Divinity twice per rest.

features.name: Destroy Undead (CR 1)
features.description: You can now destroy undead of CR 1 or lower.

features.name: Divine Intervention
features.description: Implore your deity's aid (action). Roll d%; if result ≤ your cleric level, your deity intervenes. Once used successfully, wait 7 days. At L20, always succeeds.

features.name: Channel Divinity (3/rest)
features.description: You can use Channel Divinity three times between rests.

features.name: Druidic
features.description: You know Druidic, the secret language of druids. You can leave and notice hidden Druidic messages.

features.name: Spellcasting
features.description: Prepare druid spells equal to WIS modifier + your level. Spellcasting ability: Wisdom.

features.name: Wild Shape
features.description: Magically transform into a beast you've seen (action). CR limit scales with level. Max 2 uses per short or long rest.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two by 1 each.

features.name: Timeless Body
features.description: Primal magic slows your aging: 1 year ages as 10.

features.name: Beast Spells
features.description: Cast druid spells while in Wild Shape form (as long as no material components are required).

features.name: Archdruid
features.description: You can use Wild Shape an unlimited number of times.

features.name: Second Wind
features.description: Bonus action: regain 1d10 + fighter level HP. Recharges on a short or long rest.

features.name: Action Surge
features.description: Once per short or long rest, take one additional action on your turn. (Two uses at L17.)

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two by 1 each.

features.name: Extra Attack
features.description: Attack twice when you take the Attack action. (Three times at L11, four times at L20.)

features.name: Indomitable (1/LR)
features.description: Reroll a failed saving throw. Must use new result. (2 uses at L13, 3 at L17.)

features.name: Extra Attack (3)
features.description: Attack three times when you take the Attack action.

features.name: Extra Attack (4)
features.description: Attack four times when you take the Attack action.

choices.name: Fighting Style
choices.description: Adopt a particular style of fighting as your specialty.

options.name: Archery
options.description: +2 bonus to attack rolls you make with ranged weapons.

options.name: Defense
options.description: +1 bonus to AC while wearing armor.

options.name: Dueling
options.description: +2 damage when wielding a melee weapon in one hand and no other weapons.

options.name: Great Weapon Fighting
options.description: Reroll 1s and 2s on damage dice for two-handed melee weapons (must keep new roll).

options.name: Protection
options.description: When an adjacent ally is attacked, impose disadvantage on the attack (requires a shield).

options.name: Two-Weapon Fighting
options.description: Add your ability modifier to the damage of your off-hand attack.

features.name: Unarmored Defense
features.description: While wearing no armor and not using a shield, AC = 10 + DEX modifier + WIS modifier.

features.name: Martial Arts
features.description: Use DEX for unarmed/monk weapon attacks. Unarmed strikes deal 1d4 (scaling with level). After attacking with monk weapon, make one bonus unarmed strike.

features.name: Ki
features.description: Ki points = level. Spend to use Flurry of Blows (2 bonus unarmed strikes), Patient Defense (Dodge as bonus action), or Step of the Wind (Dash/Disengage as bonus action). Ki save DC = 8 + prof + WIS. Recover on short rest.

features.name: Unarmored Movement
features.description: Speed increases by 10 ft (not in armor/shield). Increases further at higher levels.

features.name: Deflect Missiles
features.description: Reduce ranged weapon damage by 1d10 + DEX + level when hit. If reduced to 0, catch and throw back (ranged attack, 1d6 + DEX, range 20/60).

features.name: Slow Fall
features.description: Use reaction: reduce falling damage by 5 × your monk level.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two by 1 each.

features.name: Extra Attack
features.description: Attack twice when you take the Attack action.

features.name: Stunning Strike
features.description: Spend 1 ki after hitting: target makes CON save or is stunned until end of your next turn.

features.name: Ki-Empowered Strikes
features.description: Your unarmed strikes count as magical for overcoming resistance and immunity.

features.name: Evasion
features.description: DEX save against area effects: no damage on success, half on failure.

features.name: Stillness of Mind
features.description: Action: end one charmed or frightened condition on yourself.

features.name: Purity of Body
features.description: Immune to disease and poison.

features.name: Diamond Soul
features.description: Proficiency in all saving throws. Spend 1 ki to reroll any failed save.

features.name: Timeless Body
features.description: No longer need food or water. Not affected by aging magic.

features.name: Perfect Self
features.description: If you have no ki when you roll initiative, you regain 4 ki points.

features.name: Divine Sense
features.description: Action: know the location of celestials, fiends, and undead within 60 ft (not behind total cover). Lasts until end of next turn. Uses = 1 + CHA modifier per long rest.

features.name: Lay on Hands
features.description: Pool of 5 × level HP. Action: restore HP to a touched creature, or spend 5 HP to cure one disease or neutralize one poison.

features.name: Spellcasting
features.description: Prepare paladin spells equal to CHA modifier + half your level. Spellcasting ability: Charisma.

features.name: Divine Smite
features.description: When you hit with a melee weapon, expend a spell slot to deal extra radiant damage: 2d8 for 1st-level, +1d8 per slot level above 1st (+1d8 vs. undead and fiends).

features.name: Divine Health
features.description: Immune to disease, granted by the divine magic flowing through you.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two by 1 each.

features.name: Extra Attack
features.description: Attack twice when you take the Attack action.

features.name: Aura of Protection
features.description: You and allies within 10 ft add your CHA modifier (min +1) to saving throws while you're conscious. (30 ft at L18.)

features.name: Aura of Courage
features.description: You and allies within 10 ft can't be frightened while you're conscious. (30 ft at L18.)

features.name: Improved Divine Smite
features.description: Your melee weapon hits deal an extra 1d8 radiant damage (in addition to any Divine Smite).

features.name: Cleansing Touch
features.description: Action: end one spell effect on yourself or a willing creature you touch. Uses = CHA modifier per long rest.

choices.name: Fighting Style
choices.description: Adopt a particular style of fighting.

options.name: Defense
options.description: +1 to AC while wearing armor.

options.name: Dueling
options.description: +2 damage wielding a melee weapon one-handed with no other weapons.

options.name: Great Weapon Fighting
options.description: Reroll 1s and 2s on damage dice for two-handed melee weapons.

options.name: Protection
options.description: Impose disadvantage on attacks against adjacent allies (requires shield).

features.name: Spellcasting
features.description: Learn ranger spells (Wisdom-based). Spell count scales with level.

features.name: Primeval Awareness
features.description: Expend a ranger spell slot to sense aberrations, celestials, dragons, elementals, fey, fiends, or undead within 1 mile (6 miles in favored terrain) for 1 min.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two by 1 each.

features.name: Extra Attack
features.description: Attack twice when you take the Attack action.

features.name: Land's Stride
features.description: Move through non-magical difficult terrain without penalty. Advantage on saves against plants that impede movement.

features.name: Hide in Plain Sight
features.description: Spend 1 minute camouflaging yourself. Gain +10 bonus to Stealth checks while stationary.

features.name: Vanish
features.description: Use the Hide action as a bonus action on your turn. You can't be tracked by non-magical means.

features.name: Feral Senses
features.description: Awareness of invisible creatures within 30 ft. No penalty to attack invisible creatures you can detect.

features.name: Foe Slayer
features.description: Once per turn, add WIS modifier to an attack or damage roll against your favored enemy.

choices.name: Favored Enemy
choices.description: Choose a type of favored enemy. Advantage on Survival checks to track them and INT checks to recall info about them. Learn one language they speak.

options.name: Aberrations
options.description: Mind flayers, beholders, and other alien horrors from beyond the planes.

options.name: Beasts
options.description: Natural animals, from wolves to giant crabs.

options.name: Celestials
options.description: Angels and other beings of the Upper Planes.

options.name: Constructs
options.description: Golems, animated armor, and similar magical creations.

options.name: Dragons
options.description: True dragons and dragon-kin such as wyverns.

options.name: Elementals
options.description: Creatures of elemental earth, fire, water, and air.

options.name: Fey
options.description: Faerie folk, nymphs, dryads, and their kin.

options.name: Fiends
options.description: Demons, devils, and other creatures of the Lower Planes.

options.name: Giants
options.description: Hill giants, storm giants, and all giant-kin.

options.name: Monstrosities
options.description: Griffins, displacer beasts, and other unnatural monsters.

options.name: Oozes
options.description: Gelatinous cubes, black puddings, and slimes.

options.name: Plants
options.description: Shambling mounds, treants, and other plant creatures.

options.name: Undead
options.description: Zombies, skeletons, vampires, liches, and more.

options.name: Humanoids (two races)
options.description: Choose two humanoid races (e.g., orcs and gnolls).

choices.name: Natural Explorer
choices.description: Choose a favored terrain. While traveling there for 1+ hour: proficient skills doubled, no difficult terrain penalty, can't be lost non-magically, twice as much food foraging, track creature details.

options.name: Arctic
options.description: Tundra, frozen wastes, and icy mountains.

options.name: Coast
options.description: Beaches, sea cliffs, and tidal zones.

options.name: Desert
options.description: Arid wastes, sandstone canyons, and dunes.

options.name: Forest
options.description: Dense woodlands, jungles, and ancient groves.

options.name: Grassland
options.description: Open plains, savannas, and rolling prairies.

options.name: Mountain
options.description: Rocky peaks, high passes, and cliff faces.

options.name: Swamp
options.description: Bogs, marshes, and murky wetlands.

options.name: Underdark
options.description: Caverns, tunnels, and subterranean wilderness.

choices.name: Fighting Style
choices.description: Choose a particular style of fighting.

options.name: Archery
options.description: +2 bonus to attack rolls with ranged weapons.

options.name: Defense
options.description: +1 to AC while wearing armor.

options.name: Dueling
options.description: +2 damage wielding a one-handed melee weapon with no other weapons.

options.name: Two-Weapon Fighting
options.description: Add your ability modifier to off-hand attack damage rolls.

features.name: Expertise
features.description: Choose 2 skill proficiencies. Your proficiency bonus is doubled for those skills. (See Skills step to select.)

features.name: Sneak Attack
features.description: Once per turn, deal extra damage when you have advantage or an ally is adjacent to the target: 1d6 at L1, scaling to 10d6 at L19.

features.name: Thieves' Cant
features.description: Secret rogue language. Takes 2× as long to convey hidden messages, but can embed them in normal speech.

features.name: Cunning Action
features.description: Bonus action each turn: Dash, Disengage, or Hide.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two by 1 each.

features.name: Uncanny Dodge
features.description: When an attacker you can see hits you, use your reaction to halve the damage.

features.name: Expertise (2nd)
features.description: Choose 2 more proficient skills to double your proficiency bonus for.

features.name: Evasion
features.description: DEX saves vs. area effects: no damage on success, half damage on failure.

features.name: Reliable Talent
features.description: Treat d20 rolls ≤ 9 as 10 for any proficient ability check.

features.name: Blindsense
features.description: If you can hear, you're aware of hidden/invisible creatures within 10 ft.

features.name: Slippery Mind
features.description: Gain proficiency in WIS saving throws.

features.name: Elusive
features.description: No attack roll has advantage against you while you aren't incapacitated.

features.name: Stroke of Luck
features.description: On a failed ability check, treat d20 as 20. On a missed attack, treat it as a hit. Recharges on short or long rest.

features.name: Spellcasting
features.description: Know 4 spells from the Sorcerer list. Spellcasting ability: Charisma.

features.name: Font of Magic
features.description: Gain sorcery points (= level). Spend to create extra spell slots or convert slots to sorcery points. Recover on long rest.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two by 1 each.

features.name: Sorcerous Restoration
features.description: Regain 4 expended sorcery points on a short rest.

choices.name: Metamagic
choices.description: Choose 2 Metamagic options at level 3. Gain additional options at levels 10 and 17.

options.name: Careful Spell
options.description: Spend 1 SP: choose up to CHA modifier creatures — they auto-succeed on saves against your spell.

options.name: Distant Spell
options.description: Spend 1 SP: double the range of a spell (touch spells become 30 ft range).

options.name: Empowered Spell
options.description: Spend 1 SP: reroll up to CHA modifier damage dice; must keep new rolls.

options.name: Extended Spell
options.description: Spend 1 SP: double the duration of a concentration spell (max 24 hours).

options.name: Heightened Spell
options.description: Spend 3 SP: one target has disadvantage on its first saving throw against your spell.

options.name: Quickened Spell
options.description: Spend 2 SP: cast a 1-action spell as a bonus action instead.

options.name: Subtle Spell
options.description: Spend 1 SP: cast a spell without verbal or somatic components.

options.name: Twinned Spell
options.description: Spend SP equal to spell level (min 1): target a second creature with a single-target spell.

features.name: Pact Magic
features.description: Spellcasting ability: Charisma. Pact Magic slots recover on a short rest. Slot level and count scale with class level.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two by 1 each.

features.name: Eldritch Invocations (3rd)
features.description: Learn a third Eldritch Invocation.

features.name: Eldritch Invocations (4th)
features.description: Learn a fourth invocation.

features.name: Mystic Arcanum (6th level)
features.description: Cast one 6th-level spell without using a spell slot once per long rest.

features.name: Mystic Arcanum (7th level)
features.description: Cast one 7th-level spell without a slot once per long rest.

features.name: Mystic Arcanum (8th level)
features.description: Cast one 8th-level spell without a slot once per long rest.

features.name: Mystic Arcanum (9th level)
features.description: Cast one 9th-level spell without a slot once per long rest.

features.name: Eldritch Master
features.description: Spend 1 minute entreating your patron: recover all Pact Magic slots. Once per long rest.

choices.name: Eldritch Invocations
choices.description: Choose 2 Eldritch Invocations. You can replace one when you gain a warlock level.

options.name: Agonizing Blast
options.description: Requires: eldritch blast cantrip. Add CHA modifier to eldritch blast damage rolls.

options.name: Armor of Shadows
options.description: Cast mage armor on yourself at will, without a slot or components.

options.name: Beguiling Influence
options.description: Gain proficiency in Deception and Persuasion.

options.name: Devil's Sight
options.description: See normally in magical and non-magical darkness up to 120 ft.

options.name: Eldritch Sight
options.description: Cast detect magic at will, without a slot or components.

options.name: Eldritch Spear
options.description: Requires: eldritch blast. Eldritch blast range becomes 300 ft.

options.name: Eyes of the Rune Keeper
options.description: Read all writing regardless of language.

options.name: Fiendish Vigor
options.description: Cast false life at will as a 1st-level spell, without a slot or components.

options.name: Gaze of Two Minds
options.description: Action: touch a willing creature; perceive through its senses until end of your next turn.

options.name: Misty Visions
options.description: Cast silent image at will, without a slot or components.

options.name: Repelling Blast
options.description: Requires: eldritch blast. Push the target 10 ft away on a hit.

options.name: Thief of Five Fates
options.description: Cast bane once per long rest using a Pact Magic slot.

options.name: Thirsting Blade
options.description: Requires: L5, Pact of the Blade. Attack twice with your pact weapon when you take the Attack action.

choices.name: Pact Boon
choices.description: Your patron rewards you with a gift for your loyal service.

options.name: Pact of the Blade
options.description: Action: conjure a melee pact weapon of any type. It's magical, vanishes when released, and you can use CHA for its attack/damage rolls.

options.name: Pact of the Chain
options.description: Learn find familiar as a warlock spell. Your familiar can be an imp, pseudodragon, quasit, or sprite.

options.name: Pact of the Tome
options.description: Receive the Book of Shadows containing 3 cantrips from any spell list — always prepared, use INT/WIS/CHA for them.

features.name: Spellcasting
features.description: Maintain a spellbook. Prepare INT modifier + wizard level spells each long rest. Spellcasting ability: Intelligence.

features.name: Arcane Recovery
features.description: Once per day on a short rest, recover spell slots totaling up to half your wizard level (rounded up, max slot level 5).

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two by 1 each.

features.name: Spell Mastery
features.description: Choose one 1st-level and one 2nd-level spell from your spellbook. Cast each at their lowest level without a spell slot (one use each per long rest).

features.name: Signature Spells
features.description: Choose two 3rd-level spells from your book. Always prepared; cast each once per short rest at 3rd level without using a slot.

features.name: Magical Tinkering
features.description: Touch a Tiny nonmagical object and imbue it with a minor property (light, recorded message, odor, or visual/auditory static).

features.name: Spellcasting
features.description: Prepare artificer spells equal to INT modifier + half your level. Spellcasting ability: Intelligence. Tools serve as your spellcasting focus.

features.name: Infuse Item
features.description: Learn artificer infusions; infuse magic into mundane items during long rests. Number of infusions known and items infused scales with level.

features.name: The Right Tool for the Job
features.description: Over 1 hour, produce any artisan's tools you need (vanish if you produce another set).

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two by 1 each.

features.name: Arcane Armament
features.description: Attack twice when you take the Attack action using a magical weapon.

features.name: Flash of Genius
features.description: Reaction: add INT modifier to an ability check or saving throw of a creature within 30 ft. Uses = INT modifier per long rest.

features.name: Magic Item Adept
features.description: Attune to up to 4 magic items. Craft common/uncommon items in 1/4 the time at half the cost.

features.name: Spell-Storing Item
features.description: Store a 1st- or 2nd-level artificer spell in an object. Any creature can cast it; uses = INT modifier × 2. Refill on long rest.

features.name: Magic Item Savant
features.description: Attune to up to 5 items. Ignore class, race, spell, and level requirements on attunement.

features.name: Magic Item Master
features.description: Attune to up to 6 magic items.

features.name: Soul of Artifice
features.description: +1 to all saving throws per attuned magic item. Reaction on 0 HP: drop to 1 HP and end one artificer infusion.

features.name: Elemental Attunement
features.description: Your elemental subclass determines your techniques and Weirding Surge effects. Choose carefully — it defines your entire path.

features.name: Elemental Charges
features.description: You have Charges equal to your class table entry. Spend them to use Elemental Techniques. Recover all on a short or long rest.

features.name: Weirding Surge
features.description: Each time you spend a Charge, roll a d20. On 1–10, an unpredictable Weirding Surge triggers. Consult your elemental Surge table.

features.name: Elemental Shift
features.description: Bonus action (1 Charge): assume a partial elemental form, gaining benefits determined by your attunement.

features.name: Extra Attack
features.description: Attack twice when you take the Attack action.

features.name: Weirding Resilience
features.description: When you trigger a Weirding Surge, you may choose to reroll once. You must accept the second result.

features.name: Elemental Mastery
features.description: Your elemental techniques deal one additional die of damage.

features.name: Surge Stabilization
features.description: Weirding Surges now only trigger on a Charge roll of 1–5 (instead of 1–10).

features.name: Elemental Form
features.description: Spend 3 Charges: assume full elemental form for 1 minute. Resistance to your element's damage type plus additional attunement-specific benefits.

features.name: Avatar of the Weird
features.description: Once per day, unleash a devastating area effect determined by your elemental attunement.
